projectDescription: Multi-track Web Audio editor and player with React, featuring canvas waveform visualization, drag-and-drop editing, and 20+ Tone.js effects
keyFeatures: Multi-track audio editing with drag-and-drop clip manipulation
Canvas-based waveform visualization with zoom controls
20+ professional audio effects via Tone.js integration
AudioWorklet-based recording with live waveform preview
WAV export with effects rendering (individual tracks or full mix)
Time-synced text annotations with keyboard navigation
Full TypeScript support with comprehensive type definitions
Customizable theming with dark/light mode support
React provider pattern with composable hooks API
Browser-based Web Audio API with cross-browser compatibility
publicApiSurface: WaveformPlaylistProvider - Main React context provider for audio editing
MediaElementPlaylistProvider - Single-track provider with playback rate control
usePlaylistControls - Hook for play, pause, stop, seek controls
useAudioTracks - Hook for loading audio files into tracks
useDynamicEffects - Hook for master effects chain management
useTrackDynamicEffects - Hook for per-track effects
useExportWav - Hook for WAV export functionality
useIntegratedRecording - Hook for audio recording
useAnnotationControls - Hook for annotation management
useZoomControls - Hook for waveform zoom controls
useKeyboardShortcuts - Hook for custom keyboard shortcuts
Waveform - Main waveform display component
PlayButton, PauseButton, StopButton - Playback control components
ZoomInButton, ZoomOutButton - Zoom control components
MasterVolumeControl - Master volume control component
ExportWavButton - WAV export button component
RecordButton - Recording control component
createTrack - Utility to create track objects
createClipFromSeconds - Utility to create audio clips
effectDefinitions - Available Tone.js effects metadata
createEffectInstance - Factory for creating effect instances
